purpose: Frozen three-pool skill design for the PubTables-style OCR word-box benchmark.
design_notes: The task is modeled as table reconstruction, metric extraction/audit, and grounded summary reporting.
Custom skills provide answer-free procedural guidance for OCR word-box reconstruction, header/span handling, metric audits, artifact contracts, and grounded summaries.
Public SkillHub skills are retained where they are useful as general code, data, SQL, or report skills.
The manifest is documentation only; the benchmark prompt injects SKILL.md files from the configured pools in tasks/pubtables/task.py.

leakage_policy.rule: Custom skills must not contain fixture-specific entity names, dataset names, numeric target values, expected row counts, oracle artifacts, verifier identifiers, or target output contents.

table_reconstruction.rationale: General procedure for reconstructing table cells from OCR word boxes and table geometry.
Focused coordinate grouping guidance for row and column parsing.
Geometry-based filtering for captions, footnotes, and non-table text.
General guidance for multi-row headers, row spans, and column spans.
General local-code ability without table-specific reconstruction procedure.

metric_extraction_audit.rationale: General metric-table consistency checks without target values.
General file/schema/grounding checks for benchmark artifacts.
SQL-oriented data normalization and validation guidance.

summary_reporting.rationale: General grounded summary guidance based only on generated metrics and audit.
General reporting guidance for extraction results and limitations.
